title: When a patient brings you a photo of a celebrity asking for lips like theirs, how do you approach th
filename: When a patient brings you a photo of a celebrity asking for lips like theirs, how do you approach th.en.vtt
excerpt: So first thing is when a patient says they want natural there's more to it that you need to unpack in the consultation this is the same as for any request it's well worth spending the time getting them to articulate what it is that they are seeing in their own mind so this can be…

segments.text: so first thing is when a patient says they want natural there's more to it that you need to unpack in the consultation this is the same as for any request it's well worth spending the time getting them to articulate what it is that they are seeing in their own mind so this can be done with pictures of celebrities I know some people hate that but for me it's very hard to convey in words exactly what you're picturing and a picture of someone who looks similar is helpful so they might show you something that you've already done if you've already put before and afters out some patients will bring a specific image of it's best when it's one of yours but it could be someone else's before and after and then of course just getting them to describe what they are hoping to see using their own face so you get them to look in the mirror and show that you using their lips what they would like to see and this is just a it's almost like a game that you play to make sure it's all said out loud and then you actually use that information to shape their expectations so um or reflect back what they've said and say that you can do it
